agents.name: Agent Architect
agents.description: Responsible for managing the AI agent topology of this project using the wairon CLI.
agents.creationReason: Bootstrapped by wairon init as the root agent for topology management.

agents.name: Core Service Owner
agents.description: Primary architectural decision-maker for the core Waffler service.
agents.creationReason: The core service has a distinct deployment boundary, separate team ownership, and large surface area that warrants dedicated architecture ownership.

agents.name: Core Service Implementer
agents.description: Implements features and fixes within the core Waffler service.
agents.creationReason: Dedicated implementer separates day-to-day implementation work from architectural ownership decisions.

agents.name: Blueprints Service Owner
agents.description: Owns the Waffler blueprints service — blueprint creation, storage, and retrieval.
agents.creationReason: The blueprints service is a separate deployment unit with its own team and distinct domain logic.

agents.name: Network Packages Owner
agents.description: Coordinates the network package family — HTTP clients, websockets, and protocol utilities.
agents.creationReason: Network packages share conventions, versioning, and cross-cutting concerns that benefit from dedicated ownership coordination.

agents.name: Security Guardian
agents.description: Enforces security standards across the entire project — scanning for vulnerabilities, secrets, injection risks, and unsafe patterns.
agents.creationReason: Security is a cross-cutting concern that requires consistent enforcement across all service and package boundaries.
